metadata.disclaimer: Tags are file-specific in their semantic assignment. The same tag may mean different things in different files.

EquipDB.description: Master equipment and item definitions with properties.

SkillDB.description: Complete skill/ability definitions with active/passive/ultimate skills.

HeroStatDB.description: Hero stat blocks with base stats, growth rates, and attribute scaling.

HeroRosterDB.description: Hero registry with class/faction assignments and evolution paths.

StageDB.description: Campaign stages, missions, levels with enemy spawns and rewards.

MonsterDB.description: Monster/NPC definitions with stats, AI patterns, and spawn groups.

AnimDB.description: Animation, visual effects, and skeletal mesh references.

MasterDB.description: Central entity registry indexing all game objects across the cluster.

ConfigDB.description: Game system config parameters, constants, and global settings.

AchieveDB.description: Achievement definitions, progress tracking, and reward config.
